description.ko: 보랏빛 심연 속 불가능한 초승 모양의 공허가 오래된 별빛을 가리고, 성운의 층과 별먼지가 고요한 우주의 장엄 속에 떠돈다.
description.en: An impossible crescent-shaped absence eclipses ancient starlight in the violet abyss, where dust and nebula strata drift with silent cosmic majesty.

prompt: VOID-3 Cosmic Deep, a horizonless deep space nebula where an immense crescent of absolute #0D0221 darkness silently eclipses a buried field of ancient stars, not a planet but an impossible void-shadow spanning the frame. Behind it, layered #3D1A78 ultraviolet vapor banks recede into infinite depth like slow geological strata in space, while countless #E6E6FA star-dust particles drift in dense, suspended currents across the foreground. Thin #7B68EE lavender ion filaments trace fractured arcs around the crescent's edge, revealing a vast unseen pressure rather than rotation. The composition is solemn and mysterious, with very slow celestial motion, high particle density, faint parallax, restrained luminous contrast, cold volumetric haze, ultra-detailed astrophotographic texture, and cosmic horror majesty in the silent infinite void.
